title: baccharis neoaustralis
intro: Baccharis neoaustralis, also known as Chilean mistflower, is a flowering plant native to the southern Andes in Chile and Argentina. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Baccharis neoaustralis include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Baccharis neoaustralis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies and topical applications.
